# yokedcache

> MIT-licensed Python caching library for FastAPI and async services: Redis-focused auto-invalidation, optional vector helpers, multi-backend support, and production metrics.

## Summary

- Package: yokedcache (PyPI), current version **1.0.0**; **Python 3.10+** (CI: 3.10–3.14). Python **3.9**: legacy **`yokedcache==0.3.0`** only—no 1.x security backports; upgrade recommended.
- Docs: https://sirstig.github.io/yokedcache/
- API (HTML): https://sirstig.github.io/yokedcache/api/
- Changelog: https://sirstig.github.io/yokedcache/changelog.html
- Repository: https://github.com/sirstig/yokedcache

## Install

```
pip install yokedcache
```

Extras: `yokedcache[full]` for optional backends and monitoring stacks; see PyPI metadata and getting-started guide.

## Human-maintained guides

- Getting started: https://sirstig.github.io/yokedcache/getting-started.html
- Configuration: https://sirstig.github.io/yokedcache/configuration.html
- Usage patterns: https://sirstig.github.io/yokedcache/usage-patterns.html
- FastAPI: https://sirstig.github.io/yokedcache/tutorials/fastapi.html
- Backends: https://sirstig.github.io/yokedcache/backends.html

## API reference

Use the generated pdoc site under `/api/` for module and class-level docstrings (authoritative for Python API surface).

## Maintainer

Joshua Kac (Project Yoked LLC). Organization: https://www.projectyoked.com
